race.comment: DOUBELLA (9) turned in a strong performance first-up when third to She's Extra at Newcastle. Up in class from the wide gate with a poor eleventh over 1100m at Canterbury. Can bounce back from the inside gate with the blinkers going on. Worth noting She's Extra franked the form when winning in town last Wednesday. DRUMFIRE (1) Farnan colt from Can't Get Enough on debut for the Waterhouse & Bott yard. Impressed in two trials and can overcome the sticky draw. MY QUEEN (10) Wootton Bassett filly from Oxidization on debut for the Lees' yard. Has shown ability in her two trials and look for her late. FLIGHT OF POWER (3) Wild Ruler gelding from Canary on debut for the Baker stable. Made improvement in his last two trials and stays in the mix. FAWLTY AFFAIRS (2) Home Affairs colt from Sybel on debut for the Richard & Will Freedman stable. Trialled well and gets the gun run with the blinkers being added.
